name: Bemis Company, Inc.
description: Bemis Company, Inc. was a major global manufacturer of flexible packaging products and pressure-sensitive materials. Headquartered in Neenah, Wisconsin, the company served customers worldwide with packaging used primarily by the food, consumer products, medical, and pharmaceutical industries. Founded in 1858, Bemis operated technical centers and manufacturing facilities in multiple countries until its acquisition by Amcor plc in June 2019.
